title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Ruby Hall Clinic

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Ruby Hall Clinic
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic:
Ruby Hall Clinic is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic!
